message:
Running command: ls /tmp/smoke_test* 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
# Need to use -o correctly
PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
DESIGN_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"

cd /tmp
iverilog -g2005-sv \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/tb/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -f "$DESIGN_ROOT/filelists/mspm33c321a_derivative_compute_ss.f" \
  -o smoke_test \
  2>&1 | tail -5
echo "EXIT: $?"
ls -la /tmp/smoke_test 2>/dev/null
